final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a "clean, bright, airy, feminine" aesthetic with floral accents and purple flowers — references in the spirit of Glossier brand photography, Herbivore Botanicals product staging, Kinfolk editorial minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with left column (copy + CTAs), center (model), right column (products + stats)
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum, with 2 product items (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle, packaging box)
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy studio setting — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, bright lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), navigation links "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", CTA button "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve all UI elements: 5 nav links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped with icons), 3 bullet points (pink checkmarks), 2 CTA buttons, trust badges, 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons)
Avoid:
